research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Lidocaine is a Class IB sodium-channel blocker; minimal QT effect under therapeutic exposures; widely used as local anesthetic and IV antiarrhythmic.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: Sodium-channel framing well-known; multi-current framing uncommon. SEALED for blind evaluation.
